name: Mexican Beef Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. In a 10-inch skillet over medium-high heat, cook ground beef for about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally until well browned.
3. Stir in chili powder and cook for 1 minute.
4. Remove from heat; stir in taco sauce, green chiles, and salt.
5. In a small bowl, combine corn with half of the green onions.
6. In a 1-1/2-quart casserole dish, layer half of the corn mixture, half of the beef mixture, half of the olives, and half of the cheese.
7. Repeat the layering process.
8. Cover and bake for 20 minutes until heated through and cheese is melted.
9. Garnish with tortilla chips, sour cream, tomato, and remaining green onions.
10. Serve.
